violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (multiple slicers) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicers were observed put away in clean rack with visible food debris. PIC relocated slicers to be fully cleaned and sanitized. Proper sanitizing procedures to be reviewed with all staff. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026
The handsink toward the back was observed leaking from the hot water handle when in use. Handle to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine to be cleaned by end of day tomorrow. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2026

The toilet in the men's room was dirty. Plumbing fixtures such as handwashing sinks, toilets, and urinals shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Toilet was cleaned during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023
The outside dumpsters are not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023

The floors and walls throughout the facility, including the walk-in cooler and walk-in freezer have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023
